task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "在微信应用中打开目标文章"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "点击右上角的\"•••\"按钮以打开菜单"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "查找并选择\"复制链接\"或\"分享给朋友\"选项"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "通过文件传输助手将文章分享给自己"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "长按分享的文章以复制链接"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "将复制的链接粘贴到笔记或消息中进行确认"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "验证链接是否符合标准URL格式（如https://mp.weixin.qq.com/...）"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "将链接发送给朋友或在浏览器中打开以测试其可用性"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "处理需要微信登录、过期、区域限制或服务器问题等加载失败的情况"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "尝试使用微信内置浏览器打开链接"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "保存文章至微信收藏夹以备离线访问"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "对文章内容进行截图保存"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "openMenu"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "selectOption"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node5", "type": "copyLink"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "shareToFriend"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "longPressToCopy"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "pasteLink"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "validateFormat"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "testAvailability"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "handleFailure"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "tryInWeChatBrowser"}, {"source": "Node1", "target": "Node11", "type": "saveToFavorites"}, {"source": "Node1", "target": "Node12", "type": "screenshotArticle"}]}
